name: Send quote PDFs from form submissions and follow up automatically

parameters.content:
## Send quote PDFs from form submissions and follow up automatically

### Who's it for
Freelancers, agencies, and service businesses that receive quote requests and lose deals by replying late or forgetting to follow up.

### How it works
1. A prospect fills out the built-in n8n form (no external form tool needed)
2. The workflow builds a professional quote as a PDF using the Acrewity community node
3. The quote is emailed to the prospect via Gmail within seconds of the request
4. After a configurable delay (default 3 days) a polite follow-up email is sent automatically

### How to set up
1. Install the verified community node `@acrewity/n8n-nodes-acrewity` and add your Acrewity API credential (free key at acrewity.com, 100 free credits/month)
2. Connect your Gmail credential to both email nodes
3. Edit the Workflow configuration node: company name, sender name, quote validity, follow-up delay
4. Activate the workflow and share the form URL from the trigger node

### Requirements
Acrewity API key (free tier works), Gmail account.

### How to customize
Edit the form fields in the trigger, the quote look in Build quote HTML, and both email texts in the Gmail nodes. Add a CRM node after the follow-up to log the lead, or an If node to skip the follow-up when the prospect already replied.

parameters.formDescription: Tell us what you need and we will send you a quote within minutes.

assignments.name: hourlyRateNote
assignments.value: Final pricing is confirmed after a short scoping call.

parameters.subject: =Your quote {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }} from {{ $('Workflow configuration').first().json.companyName }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Thanks for reaching out. Your quote {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }} is attached as a PDF and is valid until {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.validUntil }}.

Reply to this email with any questions — happy to adjust the scope.

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow configuration').first().json.senderName }}

parameters.subject: =Following up on quote {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Just checking in on the quote I sent a few days ago ({{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }}). It is valid until {{ $('Build quote HTML').item.json.validUntil }}.

If anything about the scope or pricing does not fit, tell me what would work better and I will revise it.

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow configuration').first().json.senderName }}

parameters.content:
**1. Intake**
The built-in n8n form collects the request. Share its URL anywhere — no external form tool needed. Configuration lives in the Set node.

**2. Quote generation**
A styled quote is built from the submission and rendered to PDF by the Acrewity node, then emailed to the prospect within seconds.

**3. Automatic follow-up**
After the configured delay the workflow resumes and sends a polite follow-up referencing the quote number. Adjust the delay in the configuration node.
